questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to IPSec & VPNs?
options: Inefficient scaling of Encapsulating Security Payload (ESP) headers, tunnel vs transport modes, and secure routing.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Encapsulating Security Payload (ESP) headers, tunnel vs transport modes, and secure routing.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Encapsulating Security Payload (ESP) headers, tunnel vs transport modes, and secure routing scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
